hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && case "$(basename "$f")" in *.bak.*) ;; .env|.env.*) cp "$f" "$f.bak.$(date +%s)" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|`]|\$\()[[:space:]]*(sudo[[:space:]]+)?pm2[[:space:]]+restart([[:space:]]|$)' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])--update-env([^A-Za-z0-9_-]|$)'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "The pm2 + --update-env restart pattern does not re-evaluate ecosystem.config.cjs. Use: pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.cjs with fresh env (export $(cat .env | xargs)). See memory/feedback_pm2_env_management.md."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+(commit|tag)[[:space:]]'; then exit 0; fi; reason=''; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'aws[[:space:]]+dynamodb[[:space:]]+(delete-table|delete-item|batch-write-item|drop-table)'; then reason='BLOCKED: aws dynamodb destructive operation (delete-table/delete-item/batch-write-item). Production data cannot be deleted autonomously. Get explicit user confirmation first.'; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f|rm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*r' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qvE '/tmp/'; then reason='BLOCKED: rm -rf outside /tmp is forbidden without explicit user confirmation. Production files/data may be irreversibly lost.'; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(DROP[[:space:]]+(TABLE|DATABASE|SCHEMA)|TRUNCATE[[:space:]]+TABLE)'; then reason='BLOCKED: SQL destructive statement (DROP/TRUNCATE) requires explicit user confirmation.'; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'aws[[:space:]]+s3[[:space:]]+rm[[:space:]]' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qv 'sync'; then reason='BLOCKED: aws s3 rm requires explicit user confirmation. S3 objects cannot be recovered without versioning.'; fi; if [ -n "$reason" ]; then jq -n --arg r "$reason" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: $r}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*(pnpm[[:space:]]+deploy:|\./scripts/deploy-|ALLOW_PROD_DIRECT=1[[:space:]])'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(43\.200\.67\.52)'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "BLOCKED: direct prod EC2 access (43.200.67.52). Use pnpm deploy:<app>:prod or ./scripts/deploy-*-production.sh. For genuine recovery, prefix with ALLOW_PROD_DIRECT=1. See feedback_no_raw_rsync_to_prod.md and the 2026-05-03 cross-app overwrite incident."}}'; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */scripts/deploy-*-production.sh) /home/naru/my_apps/nasun-monorepo/scripts/lint-deploy-scripts.sh >&2 || echo 'WARNING: lint-deploy-scripts.sh failed -- review the script for cross-app overwrite class typos before deploying.' >&2 ;; esac; } 2>&1 || true
